explanation_used:
1. **Opening statement**: This neuron strongly responds to formal reporting on consequential political, social, or scientific events that feature authoritative statements, institutional actions, or significant impacts (such as government policies, scientific findings, legal proceedings, or conflict reports).

2. **Domain coverage**: The pattern appears across multiple languages (English, Spanish, Italian, Russian, Arabic, Dutch, Portuguese, etc.) and spans domains like public health, geopolitics, environmental issues, legal systems, academic research, and disaster reporting. These texts often include direct quotes, citations of experts or organizations, references to studies, and specific geographical or institutional entities.

3. **Contrast with low-activation examples**: High-activation texts consistently contain attributions (e.g., “said,” “stated,” “found”), quotes, or references to authoritative sources, along with detailed descriptions of events with broader societal implications. Low-activation examples are typically simple announcements, personal narratives, or routine news without such attributions, focusing on localized, human-interest, or straightforward factual content lacking formal reporting structure.

4. **Closing interpretation**: The neuron detects text segments that function as informative, source-attributed reporting on matters of public interest, characterized by a formal tone and a focus on events with wider relevance or consequence.

results.actual_text: ्य चाणक्य के अनुसार जब शिशु मां के ग
results.plain_text:
Dainik Bhaskar Dec 20, 2018, 11:05 AM IST रिलिजन डेस्क. आचार्य चाणक्य ने अपने नीति ग्रंथ के माध्यम से कई महत्वपूर्ण बातें बताई हैं। आचार्य चाणक्य के अनुसार जब शिशु मां के गर्भ में होता है तभी कुछ बातें तय हो जाती है। चाणक्य के अनुसार उस बच्चे की किस्मत से जुड़ी खास बातें मां के गर्भ में रहते हुए ही तय हो जाती है। ये 5 बातें उस बच्चे के जीवन में बहुत खास होती है। चाणक्य के अनुसार गर्भ में उस बच्चे की आयु और मृत्यु भी तय हो जाती है। उन्होने अपनी नीति शास्त्र के चौथे अध्याय के पहले श्लोक में जीवन औ मृत्यु के अलावा अन्य 3 बातों के बारे में बताया है।  
आचार्य चाणक्य कहते हैं कि - 
आयुः कर्म च वित्तं च विद्या निधनमेव च । 
पञ्चैतानि हि सृज्यन्ते गर्भस्थस्यैव देहिनः ।। (चाणक्य-नीतिः–०४.०१) 
भावार्थ: जीव जब गर्भ में होता है, उस समय उसकी आयु, कर्म, धन, विद्या और मृत्यु—ये पाँच बातें निश्चित हो जाती हैं । चाणक्य का मनाना था कि एक मनुष्य के जीवन में लगभग एक सौ एक बार मृत्यु का योग बनता है। जिसमें एक बार काल मृत्यु और बाकी अकाल मृत्यु होती हैं। इन अकाल मृत्यु को कर्म और भोग से बदला जा सकता है। इसके अलावा चाणक्य ने बताया कि गर्भ में ही उस बच्चे के कर्म, भाेग, धन और विद्या तय हो जाती है। चाणक्य के अनुसार ये सब बातें पिछले जन्म के कर्म ओर माता के कर्मों को मिलाकर तय हो जाती है।

results.actual_text: a rabies vaccine that is given to babies as young as three months, underscoring the difficulties China faces in cleaning up the image of what is the world’s
results.plain_text:
SHANGHAI: A vaccine scandal in China, which has prompted angry reactions from leaders and citizens fed up with safety scares in the country, is sending ripples across the local drug market and threatening Chinese ambitions to play a larger global role. 
Shares in Chinese vaccine makers and biotech firms fell across the board on Monday after Premier Li Keqiang slammed Changsheng Biotechnology Co for having crossed a moral red line and called for swift action. 
Changsheng has been found to have faked production documents related to a rabies vaccine that is given to babies as young as three months, underscoring the difficulties China faces in cleaning up the image of what is the world’s No2 drug industry as it aims to promote locally made vaccines globally. 
While there have been no apparent reports of people being harmed by the vaccine, the regulator ordered Changsheng to halt production and recall the product after the scandal emerged earlier this month. 
The case has gone viral in China, where sensitivity over food and drug safety is extremely high after a slew of scandals over the last decade. It was among the most hotly discussed topics on microblogging website Sina Weibo on Monday. 
In a statement posted on the government’s website late on Sunday, Premier Li called for an immediate investigation and urged severe punishment for the companies and people implicated. He added the public needed clear information. 
“We will resolutely crack down on illegal and criminal acts that endanger the safety of peoples’ lives, resolutely punish lawbreakers according to the law, and resolutely and severely criticise dereliction of duty in supervision,” he said. The China Food and Drug Administration said in a statement that its investigation had found that Changsheng fabricated production records and product inspection records, in “serious violations” of the law. 
PUBLIC HEALTH CRISIS: Changsheng apologised in a regulatory filing and said the suspension of its vaccine would have a significant impact on its finances. It added some regional disease control agencies had suspended some of its other vaccines. 
It also flagged on Monday that the firm may face the risk of having to delist due to an investigation by China’s securities regulator into suspected violations of information disclosure. 
This is, however, not Changsheng’s first brush with quality issues. Last year, it sold 252,600 substandard DPT vaccines to inoculate children against diphtheria, whooping cough and tetanus, a regulator in the northeastern Jilin said on Friday. 
China’s pharmaceutical industry has been plagued with such scandals, with another company Wuhan Institute of Biological Products also being implicated in the DPT vaccine issue last year and the police busting a gang for selling around $90 million worth of illegal vaccines on the black market in 2016. — Reuters Rival warplane projects underline EU’s divisions G20 calls for stepped-up trade dialogue; no pact on path forward

results.actual_text: ению Совета Федерации относится "решение вопроса о возможности использования Вооруженных сил РФ за пределами территории Российской Федерации". Владимир Пут
results.plain_text: МОСКВА, 22 февраля. /ТАСС/. Ратификация договоров России с Луганской и Донецкой народными республиками (ЛНР и ДНР) позволит президенту РФ Владимиру Путину использовать российские вооруженные силы за рубежом без дополнительных решений Совета Федерации. Об этом ТАСС сообщил во вторник источник в верхней палате парламента.  "Ратификация договоров с ЛНР и ДНР позволит президенту использовать ВС РФ за рубежом. Дополнительных санкций Совета Федерации не потребуется", - сказал собеседник агентства.  По его словам, во вторник пройдут заседания профильных комитетов СФ, на которых будут рассмотрены ратификационные документы.  По Конституции РФ, к ведению Совета Федерации относится "решение вопроса о возможности использования Вооруженных сил РФ за пределами территории Российской Федерации".  Владимир Путин 21 февраля заявил о признании суверенитета Донецкой и Луганской народных республик. С их лидерами были подписаны договоры о дружбе, сотрудничестве и взаимной помощи.

По его словам, во вторник пройдут заседания профильных комитетов СФ, на которых будут рассмотрены ратификационные документы.

results.actual_text: GREEN BAY, Wis. (WFRV) – Notre Dame Academy in Green
results.plain_text: GREEN BAY, Wis. (WFRV) – Notre Dame Academy in Green Bay is excited to bring its rendition of the beautiful and dynamic musical to the stage, for the high school’s performance of Disney’s The Little Mermaid.  Based on the classic animated film and broadway show, Disney’s The Little Mermaid will captivate people of all ages.  Notre Dame’s rendition features bright colors and vibrant lights that help to bring Ariel, King Triton’s youngest daughter, to life as she wishes to pursue the human Prince Eric, while bargaining with the evil sea witch, Ursula, to trade her tail for legs.  With music by eight-time Academy Award winner, Alan Menken, lyrics by Howard Ashman and Glenn Slater, and a compelling book by Doug Wright, Notre Dame’s Center Stage Liaison, Chris Salerno, says this musical will “capture your heart with its irresistible and memorable songs.”  Salerno promises many stand-out performances by both individuals and ensembles with an amazing set, amazing lighting, and incredible costumes.  The preparation did not come without its challenges, however, including fighting for auditorium space. “This was a challenge with set construction and storage. The set crew had to work many long and diverse hours to make it work,” said Salerno. “We ran into many challenges at the beginning of our production with student illnesses and a lead role leaving school. However, I do believe any immediate obstacles we faced made the cast more united.”  The school is part of the Fox Cities Performing Art Center’s (PAC) Center Stage Program as well, which is showcasing a record 31 schools this year.  “We LOVE Center Stage. They have provided so many amazing opportunities for our students,” stated Salerno. “Our students have participated in several workshops and clinics over the last five years. Thank you!”  Show times include:  January 19-21 at 7 p.m. January 21-22 at 2 p.m. Join Ariel and her colorful friends Flounder the fish, Scuttle the seagull, and Sebastian the crab for five performances at Notre Dame Academy beginning January 19.
